---
title: "Utah ZIP Map"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
freeze: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(jsonlite)
library(scales)

excess_alert_threshold <- 0.80
ramp_alert_threshold <- 0.90
svg_width <- 1000
svg_height <- 720
svg_margin <- 18

as_date_safe <- function(x) {
  if (inherits(x, "Date")) return(x)
  if (inherits(x, "POSIXt")) return(as.Date(x))

  parsed <- suppressWarnings(lubridate::parse_date_time(
    as.character(x),
    orders = c("ymd", "mdy", "Ymd", "mdY", "ymd HMS", "mdy HMS"),
    tz = "UTC",
    exact = FALSE
  ))

  as.Date(parsed)
}

ensure_cols <- function(x, cols) {
  for (nm in setdiff(cols, names(x))) x[[nm]] <- NA
  x
}

read_surveillance <- function() {
  candidates <- c(
    "surveillance dashboard.csv",
    "surveillance_dashboard.csv",
    "surv_csv.csv",
    "surv_csv2.csv"
  )

  for (path in candidates) {
    if (file.exists(path)) {
      return(readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE))
    }
  }

  tibble()
}

required_cols <- c(
  "zip", "end_date", "outbreak_id", "outbreak_label", "anchor_date",
  "first_detection_date", "latest_pr_excess_gt0", "latest_pr_excess_gt1",
  "latest_pr_excess_gt2", "max_pr_excess_gt0_last7",
  "max_pr_excess_gt1_last7", "max_pr_excess_gt2_last7",
  "max_pr_rate_mult_gt_1_10", "max_pr_rate_mult_gt_1_25",
  "first_excess_gt0_90_date_last7", "first_excess_gt2_80_date_last7",
  "earliest_supported_ramp_10_date", "earliest_supported_ramp_50_date",
  "n_divergent", "n_tree_max"
)

date_cols <- c(
  "end_date", "anchor_date", "first_detection_date",
  "first_excess_gt0_90_date_last7", "first_excess_gt2_80_date_last7",
  "earliest_supported_ramp_10_date", "earliest_supported_ramp_50_date"
)

prob_cols <- c(
  "latest_pr_excess_gt0", "latest_pr_excess_gt1", "latest_pr_excess_gt2",
  "max_pr_excess_gt0_last7", "max_pr_excess_gt1_last7",
  "max_pr_excess_gt2_last7", "max_pr_rate_mult_gt_1_10",
  "max_pr_rate_mult_gt_1_25"
)

surv_raw <- read_surveillance() %>%
  ensure_cols(required_cols)

surv <- if (nrow(surv_raw) == 0) {
  tibble()
} else {
  surv_raw %>%
    mutate(
      zip = str_pad(as.character(zip), width = 5, side = "left", pad = "0"),
      across(any_of(date_cols), as_date_safe),
      across(any_of(prob_cols), as.numeric),
      n_divergent = as.numeric(n_divergent),
      n_tree_max = as.numeric(n_tree_max),
      end_date_label = format(end_date, "%Y-%m-%d"),
      signal_score = pmax(
        coalesce(max_pr_excess_gt2_last7, 0),
        coalesce(max_pr_rate_mult_gt_1_10, 0),
        coalesce(latest_pr_excess_gt2, 0)
      ),
      alert_class = case_when(
        max_pr_excess_gt2_last7 >= excess_alert_threshold ~ "High excess",
        max_pr_rate_mult_gt_1_10 >= ramp_alert_threshold ~ "Supported ramp",
        max_pr_excess_gt0_last7 >= 0.90 ~ "Any excess",
        TRUE ~ "Watch"
      )
    ) %>%
    arrange(end_date, zip)
}

fmt_pct <- function(x) percent(x, accuracy = 1)

fmt_date_chr <- function(x) {
  ifelse(is.na(x), NA_character_, format(x, "%Y-%m-%d"))
}

zip_meta <- tibble(
  zip = character(),
  major_city = character(),
  county = character(),
  lat = numeric(),
  lng = numeric()
)

if (requireNamespace("zipcodeR", quietly = TRUE)) {
  data("zip_code_db", package = "zipcodeR")
  zip_meta <- zip_code_db %>%
    transmute(
      zip = as.character(zipcode),
      major_city,
      county,
      state,
      lat = as.numeric(lat),
      lng = as.numeric(lng)
    ) %>%
    filter(state == "UT") %>%
    select(zip, major_city, county, lat, lng)
}

shape_path <- "utah_zcta_geometry.rds"

make_fallback_shapes <- function() {
  if (nrow(zip_meta) == 0) {
    return(tibble(zip = character(), path = character()))
  }

  bbox <- c(xmin = -114.12, xmax = -108.95, ymin = 36.95, ymax = 42.05)
  project <- function(lon, lat) {
    tibble(
      x = svg_margin + ((lon - bbox[["xmin"]]) / (bbox[["xmax"]] - bbox[["xmin"]])) * (svg_width - 2 * svg_margin),
      y = svg_margin + (1 - ((lat - bbox[["ymin"]]) / (bbox[["ymax"]] - bbox[["ymin"]]))) * (svg_height - 2 * svg_margin)
    )
  }

  zip_meta %>%
    filter(!is.na(lat), !is.na(lng)) %>%
    mutate(
      path = pmap_chr(list(lng, lat), function(lon, lat) {
        p <- project(lon, lat)
        r <- 7
        paste0(
          "M ", round(p$x - r, 2), " ", round(p$y, 2),
          " a ", r, " ", r, " 0 1 0 ", 2 * r, " 0",
          " a ", r, " ", r, " 0 1 0 -", 2 * r, " 0"
        )
      })
    ) %>%
    select(zip, path)
}

make_svg_shapes <- function(geo) {
  zip_col <- intersect(c("ZCTA5CE20", "GEOID20", "ZCTA5CE10", "GEOID10", "zip"), names(geo))[1]
  if (is.na(zip_col)) return(make_fallback_shapes())

  geo <- geo %>%
    mutate(zip = str_pad(as.character(.data[[zip_col]]), width = 5, side = "left", pad = "0")) %>%
    st_transform(4326) %>%
    st_make_valid()

  geo_simple <- suppressWarnings(
    geo %>%
      st_transform(26912) %>%
      st_simplify(dTolerance = 450, preserveTopology = TRUE) %>%
      st_transform(4326)
  )

  bbox <- st_bbox(geo_simple)
  project_matrix <- function(mat) {
    tibble(
      x = svg_margin + ((mat[, 1] - bbox[["xmin"]]) / (bbox[["xmax"]] - bbox[["xmin"]])) * (svg_width - 2 * svg_margin),
      y = svg_margin + (1 - ((mat[, 2] - bbox[["ymin"]]) / (bbox[["ymax"]] - bbox[["ymin"]]))) * (svg_height - 2 * svg_margin)
    )
  }

  ring_path <- function(mat) {
    pts <- project_matrix(mat)
    paste0(
      "M ", paste(round(pts$x, 2), round(pts$y, 2), sep = " ", collapse = " L "),
      " Z"
    )
  }

  geom_path <- function(g) {
    if (inherits(g, "POLYGON")) {
      return(paste(vapply(unclass(g), ring_path, character(1)), collapse = " "))
    }

    if (inherits(g, "MULTIPOLYGON")) {
      return(paste(unlist(lapply(unclass(g), function(poly) {
        vapply(poly, ring_path, character(1))
      })), collapse = " "))
    }

    ""
  }

  tibble(
    zip = geo_simple$zip,
    path = vapply(st_geometry(geo_simple), geom_path, character(1))
  ) %>%
    filter(path != "") %>%
    distinct(zip, .keep_all = TRUE)
}

shape_tbl <- if (file.exists(shape_path)) {
  make_svg_shapes(readRDS(shape_path))
} else {
  make_fallback_shapes()
}

dates <- if (nrow(surv) > 0) sort(unique(surv$end_date)) else as.Date(character())
default_date <- if (length(dates) > 0) min(dates) else as.Date(NA)
default_zip <- if ("84020" %in% surv$zip) "84020" else if (nrow(surv) > 0) surv$zip[[1]] else NA_character_

mapped_zips_by_date <- surv %>%
  semi_join(shape_tbl, by = "zip") %>%
  count(end_date, name = "mapped_zips") %>%
  mutate(end_date = fmt_date_chr(end_date))

data_rows <- surv %>%
  left_join(zip_meta, by = "zip") %>%
  mutate(
    end_date = fmt_date_chr(end_date),
    anchor_date = fmt_date_chr(anchor_date),
    first_detection_date = fmt_date_chr(first_detection_date),
    first_excess_gt0_90_date_last7 = fmt_date_chr(first_excess_gt0_90_date_last7),
    first_excess_gt2_80_date_last7 = fmt_date_chr(first_excess_gt2_80_date_last7),
    earliest_supported_ramp_10_date = fmt_date_chr(earliest_supported_ramp_10_date),
    earliest_supported_ramp_50_date = fmt_date_chr(earliest_supported_ramp_50_date)
  ) %>%
  select(
    zip, end_date, outbreak_label, anchor_date, first_detection_date,
    major_city, county,
    latest_pr_excess_gt0, latest_pr_excess_gt1, latest_pr_excess_gt2,
    max_pr_excess_gt0_last7, max_pr_excess_gt1_last7, max_pr_excess_gt2_last7,
    max_pr_rate_mult_gt_1_10, max_pr_rate_mult_gt_1_25,
    first_excess_gt0_90_date_last7, first_excess_gt2_80_date_last7,
    earliest_supported_ramp_10_date, earliest_supported_ramp_50_date,
    n_divergent, n_tree_max, signal_score, alert_class
  )

unmatched_zips <- setdiff(sort(unique(surv$zip)), shape_tbl$zip)

payload <- list(
  viewBox = list(width = svg_width, height = svg_height),
  shapes = shape_tbl,
  rows = data_rows,
  dates = fmt_date_chr(dates),
  mappedByDate = mapped_zips_by_date,
  defaultZip = default_zip,
  defaultDate = fmt_date_chr(default_date),
  unmatchedZips = unmatched_zips
)
```

```{=html}
<style>
body {
  background: #f5f6f6;
  color: #26323a;
}

#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}

main.content {
  max-width: none;
  padding: 0;
}

.surv-app {
  min-height: calc(100vh - 58px);
  background: #f5f6f6;
  font-family: "Source Sans 3", "Source Sans Pro", "Avenir Next", "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
}

.surv-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: end;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: 0.72rem 1.05rem 0.82rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #d7dde1;
  background: #ffffff;
}

.surv-kicker,
.metric-label,
.detail-kicker {
  color: #677580;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.surv-header h1 {
  margin: 0.1rem 0 0;
  color: #253039;
  font-size: clamp(1.35rem, 2vw, 2.05rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.surv-subtitle {
  margin: 0.28rem 0 0;
  color: #667480;
  font-size: 0.94rem;
}

.surv-status {
  color: #64727c;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.surv-layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 420px;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: 1rem;
}

.map-stage,
.detail-panel {
  border: 1px solid #d4dadd;
  background: #ffffff;
}

.map-stage {
  position: relative;
  min-height: 740px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.map-frame {
  position: relative;
  height: 672px;
}

#zipMap {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
}

.zip-area {
  fill: #cdd6db;
  fill-rule: evenodd;
  stroke: #aebbc2;
  stroke-width: 0.7;
  vector-effect: non-scaling-stroke;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: fill 120ms ease, opacity 120ms ease, stroke 120ms ease;
}

.zip-area.has-data:hover,
.zip-area.selected {
  stroke: #27333b;
  stroke-width: 1.5;
}

.zip-area.no-data {
  fill: #dce2e5;
  opacity: 0.68;
  cursor: default;
}

.map-empty {
  padding: 2rem;
  color: #5d6b75;
}

.colorbar {
  position: absolute;
  right: 5.6rem;
  top: 5.75rem;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
  gap: 0.38rem;
  align-items: center;
  color: #33404a;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
}

.colorbar-title {
  grid-column: 1 / span 2;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.1;
}

.colorbar-strip {
  width: 14px;
  height: 142px;
  border: 1px solid #8c979e;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, #440154, #31688e, #35b779, #fde725);
}

.colorbar-ticks {
  display: flex;
  height: 142px;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: space-between;
}

.run-date-watermark {
  position: absolute;
  right: 8rem;
  bottom: 2.1rem;
  color: rgba(66, 75, 82, 0.28);
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.map-controls {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0.6rem 0.7rem 0.8rem;
  border-top: 1px solid #d9e0e4;
}

.play-button {
  min-width: 54px;
  border: 1px solid #bcc8d2;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: #f9fbfc;
  color: #2e3a43;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1;
  padding: 0.54rem 0.7rem;
}

.date-slider {
  width: 100%;
  accent-color: #8aa4c5;
}

.date-ticks {
  grid-column: 2;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  color: #3f4a52;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
}

.detail-panel {
  padding: 1.05rem 1.15rem;
  min-height: 740px;
}

.detail-panel h2 {
  margin: 1.25rem 0 1.1rem;
  color: #243038;
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.detail-subtitle {
  color: #677681;
  font-size: 0.94rem;
}

.chart-wrap {
  margin: 1.6rem 0 1.2rem;
}

#zipProfile {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: 230px;
}

.legend-row {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 1.2rem;
  margin-top: 0.35rem;
  color: #41515d;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
}

.legend-key {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.36rem;
}

.legend-key::before {
  content: "";
  width: 24px;
  height: 2px;
  background: var(--key);
}

.metric-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 0.7rem 0.85rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.metric {
  border-top: 1px solid #d8e0e5;
  padding-top: 0.52rem;
}

.metric-value {
  margin-top: 0.25rem;
  color: #243038;
  font-size: 1.02rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.date-list {
  margin: 1.2rem 0 0;
  border-top: 1px solid #d8e0e5;
  padding-top: 0.75rem;
}

.date-list div {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1rem;
  color: #667580;
  line-height: 1.5;
}

.date-list strong {
  color: #394854;
}

.detail-note,
.unmatched-note {
  color: #52626e;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  line-height: 1.45;
}

.detail-note {
  margin-top: 1.1rem;
}

.unmatched-note {
  margin-top: 1.2rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}

@media (max-width: 1050px) {
  .surv-layout {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .detail-panel,
  .map-stage {
    min-height: auto;
  }

  .map-frame {
    height: 560px;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 680px) {
  .surv-header,
  .surv-layout {
    padding-left: 0.65rem;
    padding-right: 0.65rem;
  }

  .surv-header {
    display: block;
  }

  .surv-status {
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
  }

  .map-frame {
    height: 480px;
  }

  .colorbar {
    right: 0.8rem;
    top: 1rem;
  }

  .run-date-watermark {
    right: 1rem;
    bottom: 1.2rem;
    font-size: 1rem;
  }
}
</style>
```

```{r, results='asis'}
cat(
  "<script id=\"survPayload\" type=\"application/json\">",
  toJSON(payload, dataframe = "rows", auto_unbox = TRUE, na = "null", digits = 7),
  "</script>",
  sep = ""
)
```

```{=html}
<div class="surv-app">
  <header class="surv-header">
    <div>
      <div class="surv-kicker">211 food-needs surveillance</div>
      <h1>Utah ZIP Map</h1>
      <p class="surv-subtitle">ZIP-level model signals by prospective run date.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="surv-status" id="survStatus">Run date: -</div>
  </header>

  <div class="surv-layout">
    <section class="map-stage" aria-label="Utah ZIP map">
      <div class="map-frame">
        <svg id="zipMap" role="img" aria-label="Utah ZIP polygons"></svg>
        <div class="colorbar" aria-hidden="true">
          <div class="colorbar-title">Pr(excess &gt; 2)</div>
          <div class="colorbar-strip"></div>
          <div class="colorbar-ticks">
            <span>50%</span>
            <span>40%</span>
            <span>30%</span>
            <span>20%</span>
            <span>10%</span>
            <span>0%</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="run-date-watermark" id="runDateWatermark">Run date: -</div>
      </div>

      <div class="map-controls">
        <button class="play-button" id="playButton" type="button">Play</button>
        <input class="date-slider" id="dateSlider" type="range" min="0" max="0" step="1" value="0" aria-label="Run date">
        <div class="date-ticks" id="dateTicks"></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <aside class="detail-panel" aria-label="Hovered ZIP details">
      <div class="detail-kicker">Hovered ZIP</div>
      <h2 id="zipTitle">ZIP -</h2>
      <div class="detail-subtitle" id="zipSubtitle">Run date -</div>

      <div class="chart-wrap">
        <svg id="zipProfile" role="img" aria-label="ZIP signal time profile"></svg>
        <div class="legend-row">
          <span class="legend-key" style="--key:#57748a">Pr(any excess)</span>
          <span class="legend-key" style="--key:#d73c2c">Pr(excess &gt; 2)</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="metric-grid">
        <div class="metric">
          <div class="metric-label">Any excess</div>
          <div class="metric-value" id="metricAny">-</div>
        </div>
        <div class="metric">
          <div class="metric-label">Excess &gt;2</div>
          <div class="metric-value" id="metricExcess">-</div>
        </div>
        <div class="metric">
          <div class="metric-label">Rate &gt;1.10</div>
          <div class="metric-value" id="metricRate">-</div>
        </div>
        <div class="metric">
          <div class="metric-label">Mapped ZIPs</div>
          <div class="metric-value" id="metricMapped">-</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="date-list">
        <div><span>Anchor</span><strong id="dateAnchor">-</strong></div>
        <div><span>First detection</span><strong id="dateDetection">-</strong></div>
        <div><span>Any excess p&gt;0.90</span><strong id="dateAny">-</strong></div>
        <div><span>Excess &gt;2 p&gt;0.80</span><strong id="dateExcess">-</strong></div>
        <div><span>Ramp 10% start</span><strong id="dateRamp10">-</strong></div>
        <div><span>Ramp 50% midpoint</span><strong id="dateRamp50">-</strong></div>
      </div>

      <p class="detail-note">Timeline shows the available model-run history for the hovered ZIP. The CSV currently includes probability summaries, so this profile uses those signals rather than raw call counts.</p>
      <p class="unmatched-note" id="unmatchedNote"></p>
    </aside>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
  const payloadNode = document.getElementById("survPayload");
  if (!payloadNode) return;

  const payload = JSON.parse(payloadNode.textContent);
  const shapes = payload.shapes || [];
  const rows = payload.rows || [];
  const dates = (payload.dates || []).filter(Boolean);
  const mappedRows = payload.mappedByDate || [];
  const svg = document.getElementById("zipMap");
  const slider = document.getElementById("dateSlider");
  const playButton = document.getElementById("playButton");
  const status = document.getElementById("survStatus");
  const watermark = document.getElementById("runDateWatermark");
  const ticks = document.getElementById("dateTicks");
  const profileSvg = document.getElementById("zipProfile");

  const els = {
    zipTitle: document.getElementById("zipTitle"),
    zipSubtitle: document.getElementById("zipSubtitle"),
    metricAny: document.getElementById("metricAny"),
    metricExcess: document.getElementById("metricExcess"),
    metricRate: document.getElementById("metricRate"),
    metricMapped: document.getElementById("metricMapped"),
    dateAnchor: document.getElementById("dateAnchor"),
    dateDetection: document.getElementById("dateDetection"),
    dateAny: document.getElementById("dateAny"),
    dateExcess: document.getElementById("dateExcess"),
    dateRamp10: document.getElementById("dateRamp10"),
    dateRamp50: document.getElementById("dateRamp50"),
    unmatchedNote: document.getElementById("unmatchedNote")
  };

  const dateIndex = new Map(dates.map((d, i) => [d, i]));
  const rowsByDate = new Map();
  const rowsByZip = new Map();
  const mappedByDate = new Map(mappedRows.map((r) => [r.end_date, Number(r.mapped_zips || 0)]));
  const pathByZip = new Map();
  let currentIndex = Math.max(0, dateIndex.get(payload.defaultDate) || 0);
  let selectedZip = payload.defaultZip || (rows[0] ? rows[0].zip : null);
  let timer = null;

  rows.forEach((row) => {
    if (!rowsByDate.has(row.end_date)) rowsByDate.set(row.end_date, new Map());
    rowsByDate.get(row.end_date).set(row.zip, row);
    if (!rowsByZip.has(row.zip)) rowsByZip.set(row.zip, []);
    rowsByZip.get(row.zip).push(row);
  });

  rowsByZip.forEach((value) => value.sort((a, b) => (dateIndex.get(a.end_date) || 0) - (dateIndex.get(b.end_date) || 0)));

  function fmtDate(date) {
    if (!date) return "n/a";
    const parsed = new Date(date + "T00:00:00Z");
    if (Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime())) return date;
    return parsed.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "2-digit", year: "numeric", timeZone: "UTC" });
  }

  function fmtIso(date) {
    return date || "n/a";
  }

  function pct(value) {
    const num = Number(value);
    if (!Number.isFinite(num)) return "n/a";
    return Math.round(num * 100) + "%";
  }

  function metric(row, field, fallback) {
    if (!row) return null;
    const primary = Number(row[field]);
    if (Number.isFinite(primary)) return primary;
    const secondary = Number(row[fallback]);
    return Number.isFinite(secondary) ? secondary : null;
  }

  function colorFor(value) {
    const num = Number(value);
    if (!Number.isFinite(num)) return "#dce2e5";
    const stops = [
      [0.00, [68, 1, 84]],
      [0.10, [72, 40, 120]],
      [0.20, [49, 104, 142]],
      [0.30, [53, 183, 121]],
      [0.50, [253, 231, 37]]
    ];
    const v = Math.max(0, Math.min(0.5, num));
    let lo = stops[0];
    let hi = stops[stops.length - 1];
    for (let i = 0; i < stops.length - 1; i++) {
      if (v >= stops[i][0] && v <= stops[i + 1][0]) {
        lo = stops[i];
        hi = stops[i + 1];
        break;
      }
    }
    const span = Math.max(0.0001, hi[0] - lo[0]);
    const t = (v - lo[0]) / span;
    const rgb = lo[1].map((c, i) => Math.round(c + (hi[1][i] - c) * t));
    return "rgb(" + rgb.join(",") + ")";
  }

  function currentDate() {
    return dates[currentIndex] || null;
  }

  function currentRow(zip) {
    const date = currentDate();
    const exact = rowsByDate.get(date);
    if (exact && exact.has(zip)) return exact.get(zip);
    const profile = rowsByZip.get(zip) || [];
    const prior = profile.filter((r) => (dateIndex.get(r.end_date) || 0) <= currentIndex);
    return prior[prior.length - 1] || profile[0] || null;
  }

  function initMap() {
    if (!dates.length || !shapes.length) {
      document.querySelector(".map-frame").innerHTML = "<div class='map-empty'>No surveillance data or Utah ZIP geometry was found.</div>";
      return;
    }

    svg.setAttribute("viewBox", "0 0 " + payload.viewBox.width + " " + payload.viewBox.height);
    shapes.forEach((shape) => {
      const path = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "path");
      path.setAttribute("d", shape.path);
      path.setAttribute("data-zip", shape.zip);
      path.setAttribute("tabindex", rowsByZip.has(shape.zip) ? "0" : "-1");
      path.classList.add("zip-area");
      if (!rowsByZip.has(shape.zip)) path.classList.add("no-data");
      path.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => selectZip(shape.zip));
      path.addEventListener("focus", () => selectZip(shape.zip));
      path.addEventListener("click", () => selectZip(shape.zip));
      svg.appendChild(path);
      pathByZip.set(shape.zip, path);
    });
  }

  function renderTicks() {
    if (!dates.length) return;
    const count = Math.min(6, dates.length);
    const labels = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
      const idx = Math.round((i / Math.max(1, count - 1)) * (dates.length - 1));
      labels.push("<span>" + dates[idx] + "</span>");
    }
    ticks.innerHTML = labels.join("");
  }

  function renderMap() {
    const date = currentDate();
    const byZip = rowsByDate.get(date) || new Map();
    status.textContent = "Run date: " + (date || "-");
    watermark.textContent = "Run date: " + (date || "-");
    slider.value = String(currentIndex);

    pathByZip.forEach((path, zip) => {
      const row = byZip.get(zip);
      const val = metric(row, "max_pr_excess_gt2_last7", "latest_pr_excess_gt2");
      path.style.fill = colorFor(val);
      path.classList.toggle("has-data", Boolean(row));
      path.classList.toggle("no-data", !row);
      path.classList.toggle("selected", zip === selectedZip);
    });
  }

  function selectZip(zip) {
    if (!rowsByZip.has(zip)) return;
    selectedZip = zip;
    renderAll();
  }

  function renderDetails() {
    const row = currentRow(selectedZip);
    if (!row) return;
    const date = row.end_date;
    const place = [row.major_city, row.county].filter(Boolean).join(", ");
    els.zipTitle.textContent = "ZIP " + row.zip;
    els.zipSubtitle.textContent = "Run date " + date + (row.outbreak_label ? " / " + row.outbreak_label : "") + (place ? " / " + place : "");
    els.metricAny.textContent = pct(metric(row, "max_pr_excess_gt0_last7", "latest_pr_excess_gt0"));
    els.metricExcess.textContent = pct(metric(row, "max_pr_excess_gt2_last7", "latest_pr_excess_gt2"));
    els.metricRate.textContent = pct(metric(row, "max_pr_rate_mult_gt_1_10", null));
    els.metricMapped.textContent = String(mappedByDate.get(currentDate()) || "-");
    els.dateAnchor.textContent = fmtIso(row.anchor_date);
    els.dateDetection.textContent = fmtIso(row.first_detection_date);
    els.dateAny.textContent = fmtIso(row.first_excess_gt0_90_date_last7);
    els.dateExcess.textContent = fmtIso(row.first_excess_gt2_80_date_last7);
    els.dateRamp10.textContent = fmtIso(row.earliest_supported_ramp_10_date);
    els.dateRamp50.textContent = fmtIso(row.earliest_supported_ramp_50_date);

    const unmatched = Array.isArray(payload.unmatchedZips)
      ? payload.unmatchedZips
      : (payload.unmatchedZips ? [payload.unmatchedZips] : []);
    els.unmatchedNote.textContent = unmatched.length ? "Unmatched ZIPs: " + unmatched.join(", ") : "";
  }

  function svgEl(name, attrs) {
    const node = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", name);
    Object.entries(attrs || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => node.setAttribute(key, value));
    return node;
  }

  function drawChart() {
    const profile = rowsByZip.get(selectedZip) || [];
    const width = 390;
    const height = 230;
    const m = { left: 42, right: 14, top: 12, bottom: 34 };
    const plotW = width - m.left - m.right;
    const plotH = height - m.top - m.bottom;
    profileSvg.setAttribute("viewBox", "0 0 " + width + " " + height);
    profileSvg.innerHTML = "";
    if (!profile.length) return;

    const x = (date) => {
      const idx = dateIndex.get(date) || 0;
      return m.left + (idx / Math.max(1, dates.length - 1)) * plotW;
    };
    const y = (value) => m.top + (1 - Math.max(0, Math.min(1, value))) * plotH;

    [0, 0.5, 1].forEach((tick) => {
      const yy = y(tick);
      profileSvg.appendChild(svgEl("line", { x1: m.left, y1: yy, x2: width - m.right, y2: yy, stroke: "#e6ecef", "stroke-width": 1 }));
      const label = svgEl("text", { x: 4, y: yy + 4, fill: "#687782", "font-size": 11 });
      label.textContent = Math.round(tick * 100) + "%";
      profileSvg.appendChild(label);
    });

    profileSvg.appendChild(svgEl("line", { x1: m.left, y1: m.top, x2: m.left, y2: height - m.bottom, stroke: "#aab5bc", "stroke-width": 1 }));
    profileSvg.appendChild(svgEl("line", { x1: m.left, y1: height - m.bottom, x2: width - m.right, y2: height - m.bottom, stroke: "#aab5bc", "stroke-width": 1 }));

    function drawLine(field, fallback, color) {
      const points = profile
        .map((row) => {
          const value = metric(row, field, fallback);
          return Number.isFinite(value) ? [x(row.end_date), y(value)] : null;
        })
        .filter(Boolean);
      if (!points.length) return;
      const d = points.map((p, i) => (i ? "L " : "M ") + p[0].toFixed(1) + " " + p[1].toFixed(1)).join(" ");
      profileSvg.appendChild(svgEl("path", { d, fill: "none", stroke: color, "stroke-width": 2.4 }));
      points.forEach((p) => profileSvg.appendChild(svgEl("circle", { cx: p[0], cy: p[1], r: 2.2, fill: color })));
    }

    drawLine("max_pr_excess_gt0_last7", "latest_pr_excess_gt0", "#57748a");
    drawLine("max_pr_excess_gt2_last7", "latest_pr_excess_gt2", "#d73c2c");

    const markerX = x(currentDate());
    profileSvg.appendChild(svgEl("line", { x1: markerX, y1: m.top, x2: markerX, y2: height - m.bottom, stroke: "#243038", "stroke-width": 1.1 }));

    const dateLabels = [dates[0], dates[Math.floor((dates.length - 1) / 2)], dates[dates.length - 1]].filter(Boolean);
    dateLabels.forEach((date, i) => {
      const label = svgEl("text", { x: x(date), y: height - 9, fill: "#596873", "font-size": 11, "text-anchor": i === 0 ? "start" : i === dateLabels.length - 1 ? "end" : "middle" });
      label.textContent = fmtDate(date).replace(", 2020", "");
      profileSvg.appendChild(label);
    });
  }

  function renderAll() {
    renderMap();
    renderDetails();
    drawChart();
  }

  if (dates.length) {
    slider.max = String(dates.length - 1);
    slider.value = String(currentIndex);
    slider.addEventListener("input", () => {
      currentIndex = Number(slider.value);
      renderAll();
    });
    playButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
      if (timer) {
        window.clearInterval(timer);
        timer = null;
        playButton.textContent = "Play";
        return;
      }
      playButton.textContent = "Pause";
      timer = window.setInterval(() => {
        currentIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % dates.length;
        renderAll();
      }, 700);
    });
  }

  initMap();
  renderTicks();
  renderAll();
})();
</script>
```
